acceptance_criteria: Over-budget input produces a stable trimmed output.
description: Compose the JSON object the planner receives from individual context providers (time, location, tool inventory, git). Honour `context.*` toggles from the effective config and enforce `context.maxContextBytes`. Produce the exact JSON shape from PRD §6.3 plus `mode` and `policy_version` fields.
notes: Truncation order matters: tools list first, then git context, then optional fields. Keep mode + datetime + cwd inviolate.
steps: TDD: Output includes every field listed in §6.3 when all toggles are on.
TDD: Setting `context.includeAvailableTools = false` omits the tools array.
TDD: Setting `context.includePolicySummary = false` omits the policy summary.
TDD: Output respects `context.maxContextBytes` — over-budget context is trimmed (oldest tool entries first) with a `truncated = true` marker.
TDD: Composer is pure: same inputs → same JSON.
Author `Public/ConvertTo-SlashOpsPromptContext.ps1` taking `(Mode, EffectiveConfig)` and gathering from each `Get-*Context`.
Apply truncation strategy when over budget; record what was trimmed.
Tests cover every toggle and the truncation path.
name: [ctx-05] ConvertTo-PromptContext composer
